prompt: A whimsical, photorealistic product-style food photograph of 8 ice cream cones lined up in a straight row on a matte black rectangular stand, each scoop designed to look like a different planet of the solar system. The scene is shot at eye level with a shallow depth of field and creamy urban bokeh in the background, suggesting an outdoor city street or café setting in soft daylight. From left to right, show exactly 8 cones: a gray speckled Mercury scoop, a yellow-brown swirling Venus scoop, a blue-and-green Earth scoop with white cloud patterns and a small blue drip, a deep red Mars scoop with darker marbling and red melted drips, a striped Jupiter scoop with its Great Red Spot visible, a pale tan Saturn scoop with a thin ring encircling it, a light icy blue Uranus scoop with a blue drip, and a vivid cobalt-blue Neptune scoop with glossy texture and blue dripping melt. Use crisp waffle cones, realistic melting details, glossy frozen surfaces, careful studio-quality lighting, and a centered symmetrical composition. Keep the planets highly recognizable but rendered as believable ice cream, with the black stand spanning the width of the frame and the background softly blurred.
